entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Don delete naka bayanan sirri. If kai sa this request, mu zai delete the bayanan sirri mu hold game da kai as na the date na naka request daga namu records da direct any service providers don do the same. a cikin some cases, deletion na iya be accomplished ta hanyar de-identification na the information. If kai zaɓi don delete naka bayanan sirri, kai na iya not be able don amfani da certain functions that require naka bayanan sirri don operate. don stop selling naka bayanan sirri. mu don’t sell ko rent naka bayanan sirri don any third parties don any purpose. mu kada a sell naka bayanan sirri don monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer na bayanan sirri don a third party, ko within namu family na companies, ba tare da monetary consideration na iya be considered a “sale” under California law. kai suna the only owner na naka bayanan sirri da can request disclosure ko deletion at any lokaci. If kai submit a request don stop selling naka bayanan sirri, mu zai stop making such transfers. Please bayani, if kai tambaya mu don delete ko stop selling naka bayanai, it na iya impact naka experience tare da mu, da kai na iya not be able don participate a cikin certain programs ko membership services wacce require the usage na naka bayanan sirri don function. amma a cikin no circumstances, mu zai discriminate against kai don exercising naka haƙƙoƙi. don exercise naka California bayanai protection haƙƙoƙi described above, please send naka request(s) ta email: support@inspir.app naka bayanai protection haƙƙoƙi, described above, suna covered ta the CCPA, gajere don the California mai amfani Privacy Act. don find out ƙarin, visit the na hukuma California Legislative Information website. CCPA took effect a kan 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Gwada it a cikin katin tunatarwa mai gina. If kai buƙata don fahimci the batu kafin making katuna, fara a cikin koyi Anything. If kai want pressure bayan reviewing katuna, move zuwa tambayoyi Me a kan Trivia ko Viva atisaye.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Maida ra'ayi, gardama, matsala, rubutu, ko yanke shawara zuwa jerin tambayoyi masu maida hankali. Abokinka yana sauraron kowace amsa, yana duba zato da gibin da ke ciki, kuma yana tura ka zuwa ga kammalawar kanka. Gwada: "Taimaka mini in fahimci farashin damar da aka rasa (opportunity cost)."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI a kusa da yanayoyin koyo don haka masu koyo can fara tare da the kind na taimako su buƙata: alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, tunawa mai aiki, wasan kwaikwayo, muhawara, ko martani.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: Unmute fim

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Binciki abubuwan da suka faru a tarihi ta hanyar dalilai, abubuwan da suka jawo su, sakamakonsu, da kuma yiwuwar abin da zai iya faruwa.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Use

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Amfani da "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. strongest learning zama moves daga karatu zuwa tunawa, martani, da one visible na gaba mataki.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Yi amfani da hutun minti 50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Amfani da a compact table don given amsa, correct ra’ayi, rashin fahimta, da na gaba move.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Amfani da a amanar tushe scorecard da tambayoyi don investigate na gaba.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Amfani da a aiki mai zurfi contract tare da outcome, block tsara, rules, da bita.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Amfani da a guided path don moving daga confusion don examples, bincike, da tunawa.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Amfani da a kai tsaye Yanayin Koyo na AI don turn this jagora zuwa tambayoyi, martani, examples, da na gaba matakai.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Amfani da a yanayi kai tsaye lokacin da kai know the exact point na confusion da want the na gaba explanation, tambaya, alama, ko madaukin bita.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Amfani da a mode tuned don alamomi, tambayoyi, tambayoyi, katunan tunatarwa, rubutu martani, ko tsarawa.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Amfani da a saƙa kan farawa

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Amfani da a structured lesson lokacin da kai know the kwas area da want a sequenced explanation ko atisaye saita.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Amfani da a table tare da front, back, alama, da na kowa tarko.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Amfani da AI as a koci don fahimta, atisaye, da martani maimakon a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Amfani da AI as a shirye-shiryen kwamfuta koci, aiki partner, mai fassarar bayanai, da bincike mai taimako while keeping the mai koyo a cikin the madauki.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Amfani da AI as a karatu tsarin aiki, not a shortcut.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Amfani da AI martani don sharpen structure da clarity ba tare da losing naka own voice.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Amfani da AI don alamomi, explanations, kuskure bincike, da madaukai na bita. kada a tambaya it don produce a final amsa kai cannot bayyana.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
